nodes.label: AI as understanding aid for complex problems
nodes.grounding_span: I asked the AI to focus only on the specific section I was inquiring about. However, it continued to provide a 'solution' that didn't work, and I didn't fully understand how it arrived at it.

nodes.label: AI as quick reference for syntax and small details
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch for fundamental skills
nodes.grounding_span: I ask it to remind me, and it usually does so very quickly and effectively.

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment of manual implementation
nodes.grounding_span: I really enjoy doing the things I already know how to do. For example, creating a fairly simple new functionality for the ERP system I work on—I enjoy the whole process.

nodes.label: AI use visible to colleagues
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like it when they see me asking questions to the AI.

nodes.label: Self-reliance in problem-solving
nodes.label_negative: Dependence on AI for difficult problems
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's important to know how to read documentation and find answers on my own.

nodes.label: Deep understanding and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I focus on using it to aid my understanding rather than to do everything for me.

nodes.label: Professional competence and skill retention
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that if I stop, I'll forget how to do them myself.

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and pride in work
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy creating all the templates and building the full functionality.

nodes.label: Social acceptance and professional image
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like them seeing me rely on AI for that, since I feel it diminishes my own ability to solve problems independently.

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's opaque solutions
nodes.grounding_span: I was very frustrated. At some point, I asked it how it had determined that the 'root' of the problem was what it was suggesting. It started giving me more 'reasons' for why that was the cause; however, although they kind of 'made sense,' they didn't really—they were just nonsense.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as quick reference
nodes.grounding_span: I ask it to remind me, and it usually does so very quickly and effectively.

nodes.label: Preference for manual implementation
nodes.grounding_span: I really enjoy doing the things I already know how to do.

nodes.label: Insecurity about being seen using AI
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like it when they see me asking questions to the AI.

nodes.label: Desire to reduce reliance on AI for difficult problems
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to reduce my reliance on AI in this regard.

nodes.label: Iterative problem decomposition — breaks problems into sub-questions after initial failure
nodes.grounding_span: I tried to be more specific: since I was trying to understand the problem so I could solve it, I asked the AI to focus only on the specific section I was inquiring about.

nodes.label: Domain compartmentalisation — firm boundaries around AI-appropriate tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I purposely use a text editor that doesn't have any AI assistance.
